severityLevels.label: 轻微
severityLevels.description: 偶尔出现，不影响日常生活
severityLevels.descriptionEn: Occasional, does not affect daily life

severityLevels.label: 轻度
severityLevels.description: 有时出现，轻微影响日常生活
severityLevels.descriptionEn: Sometimes occurs, slightly affects daily life

severityLevels.label: 中度
severityLevels.description: 经常出现，明显影响日常生活
severityLevels.descriptionEn: Often occurs, obviously affects daily life

severityLevels.label: 较重
severityLevels.description: 频繁出现，严重影响日常生活
severityLevels.descriptionEn: Frequently occurs, severely affects daily life

severityLevels.label: 严重
severityLevels.description: 持续存在，无法正常生活

symptoms.name: 恶寒
symptoms.description: 自觉怕冷，加衣被或近火取暖不能缓解

tcmMeaning.primary: 外感风寒初期，卫阳被遏，或阳气不足

patterns.condition: 长期畏寒喜暖，四肢不温

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: Early stage of external wind-cold, defensive yang is blocked, or yang qi deficiency

followUpQuestions: 症状是持续性还是间歇性？
symptoms.descriptionEn: Feeling afraid of cold, not relieved by adding clothes or near fire
followUpQuestionsEn: Is the symptom continuous or intermittent?

symptoms.name: 发热

tcmMeaning.primary: 正气抗邪，或阴阳失调，阳气偏盛

patterns.condition: 午后或夜间发热，手足心热

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: Vital qi fighting pathogens, or yin-yang imbalance, excessive yang

followUpQuestions: 发热是持续性还是间歇性？
symptoms.descriptionEn: Body temperature elevated or feeling hot
followUpQuestionsEn: 发热是持续性还是间歇性？
When is the fever more obvious?

symptoms.name: 寒热往来

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: Pathogen in Shaoyang, pivot function impaired

symptoms.descriptionEn: Alternating aversion to cold and fever

symptoms.name: 潮热
symptoms.description: 发热如潮水般定时而来
symptoms.descriptionEn: 发热如潮水般定时而来

symptoms.name: 自汗
symptoms.description: 白天不因劳累、炎热而汗出，动则益甚

tcmMeaning.primary: 气虚卫外不固，营卫不和
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 气虚卫外不固，营卫不和

followUpQuestions: 出汗是在活动后还是静息时？
symptoms.descriptionEn: 白天不因劳累、炎热而汗出，动则益甚
followUpQuestionsEn: 出汗是在活动后还是静息时？

patterns.condition: 睡则汗出，醒则汗止，手足心热

tcmMeaning.primary: 外邪束表，玄府闭塞，或津血亏虚
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 外邪束表，玄府闭塞，或津血亏虚

symptoms.name: 头痛

tcmMeaning.primary: 外感风邪，或脏腑功能失调，气血不畅

patterns.condition: 头痛连及项背，恶风畏寒

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 外感风邪，或脏腑功能失调，气血不畅

followUpQuestions: 疼痛性质（胀痛、刺痛、隐痛）？
followUpQuestionsEn: 疼痛性质（胀痛、刺痛、隐痛）？

patterns.condition: 胸痛走窜，情志不遂加重

tcmMeaning.primary: 脏腑气机阻滞，气血运行不畅
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 脏腑气机阻滞，气血运行不畅

symptoms.name: 腰痛
followUpQuestions: 腰痛性质（酸痛、刺痛、冷痛）？
followUpQuestionsEn: 腰痛性质（酸痛、刺痛、冷痛）？

symptoms.name: 纳呆

patterns.condition: 纳呆腹胀，情志不遂加重

followUpQuestions: 是食欲下降还是吃不下？
followUpQuestionsEn: 是食欲下降还是吃不下？

symptoms.name: 消谷善饥
followUpQuestions: 吃得多但体重有下降吗？
followUpQuestionsEn: 吃得多但体重有下降吗？

symptoms.name: 失眠
symptoms.description: 入睡困难，或寐而不酣，或时寐时醒，或醒后不能再寐
symptoms.descriptionEn: 入睡困难，或寐而不酣，或时寐时醒，或醒后不能再寐

symptoms.name: 多梦
symptoms.description: 睡眠中梦境纷纭，醒后疲惫
symptoms.descriptionEn: 睡眠中梦境纷纭，醒后疲惫

symptoms.name: 便秘
symptoms.description: 大便次数减少，粪质干燥，排便困难

tcmMeaning.primary: 肠道传导失常，津液不足

patterns.condition: 大便干或不干，排便无力

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 肠道传导失常，津液不足

symptoms.descriptionEn: 大便次数减少，粪质干燥，排便困难

symptoms.name: 泄泻
symptoms.description: 大便次数增多，粪质稀薄

tcmMeaning.primary: 脾失健运，肠道传导失常

patterns.condition: 泻下急迫，粪色黄褐臭秽

tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 脾失健运，肠道传导失常

symptoms.descriptionEn: 大便次数增多，粪质稀薄

tcmMeaning.primary: 外邪犯肺，或肺脏功能失调
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 外邪犯肺，或肺脏功能失调

patterns.condition: 胸闷太息，情志不遂加重
皮肤干燥瘙痒，夜间加重

tcmMeaning.primary: 肝阳上亢，气血亏虚，痰浊中阻
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 肝阳上亢，气血亏虚，痰浊中阻

symptoms.name: 耳鸣
symptoms.description: 耳内鸣响，或如蝉鸣，或如潮声
symptoms.descriptionEn: 耳内鸣响，或如蝉鸣，或如潮声

tcmMeaning.primary: 阳气不足，不能温煦四肢
tcmMeaning.primaryEn: 阳气不足，不能温煦四肢
